ast.name: textContent
error
ast.source: Failed to create chart: can't acquire context from the given item
ast.target: 创建图表失败：无法从给定项目获取上下文

ast.name: error
ast.target: 获取 canvas 上下文失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: 布局后初始化期间出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to get a right leaf. Cannot open the profile view.
ast.target: 获取正确的叶子节点失败。无法打开个人资料视图。

ast.name: error
ast.source: got no file, probably none is active
ast.target: 未获取到文件，可能没有活动文件

ast.name: error
ast.source: File name is null or undefined. Stopping further processing.
ast.target: 文件名为 null 或未定义。停止进一步处理。

ast.name: error
ast.source: file was not found to calculate maturity. Make sure one is active.
ast.target: 未找到用于计算成熟度的文件。请确保有一个活动文件。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未找到活动的 Markdown 视图。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No text selected (for progressive summarization switch Layer 2 & 3).
ast.target: 未选择文本（用于渐进式总结切换第 2 层和第 3 层）。

ast.name: log
ast.source: dataview plugin is not available to update maturity counts
ast.target: dataview 插件不可用，无法更新成熟度计数

ast.name: log
ast.source: Debug Help Function accessibility is called
ast.target: 调试帮助函数 accessibility 已调用

ast.name: log
ast.source: Format Strings replaced for prog. sum.
ast.target: 渐进式总结的格式字符串已替换

ast.name: log
ast.target: 每日目标状态栏已重置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, you get informed at startup if there is a newer version.
ast.target: 开启后，启动时如有新版本会通知您。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter tags without # and separate with ", ". Include nested tags.
ast.target: 输入标签时无需加 #，用 \", \" 分隔。包含嵌套标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter folders whose content shall be ignored. Separate with ", ".
ast.target: 输入要忽略其内容的文件夹。用 \", \" 分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can switch on the leaf for the profile.
ast.target: 您可以为个人资料切换叶子节点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can point here to a picture you would like to use as avatar. Include your vault path.
ast.target: 您可以在此处指向您想用作头像的图片。请包含您的库路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
You can remove the init command from command prompt by switching off.
restart needed.
ast.target: 您可以通过关闭来从命令提示符中移除初始化命令。\n需要重启。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: you can enable here an automatic trigger to rate a note when changed/created
ast.target: 您可以在此处启用自动触发器，在笔记更改/创建时进行评分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter in seconds how long to wait after a change before automatic note rating will be done
ast.target: 输入更改后等待多少秒再进行自动笔记评分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter in seconds to delay the load time. e.g. when GIT pull is performed before and settings get merge conflicts. Without GIT usage, keep it to 0.
ast.target: 输入延迟加载时间（秒）。例如，当 GIT pull 在之前执行且设置出现合并冲突时。如果不使用 GIT，请保持为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter in seconds. 4 seconds or more is a good value
ast.target: 输入秒数。4 秒或更长是合适的值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can change which formatting you use for Layer 2 and 3.
ast.target: 您可以更改第 2 层和第 3 层使用的格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
`Toggle ON`: Display release notes each time you update the plugin
`Toggle OFF`: Silent mode. You can still read release notes on [GitHub](https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm)
ast.target: `开启`：每次更新插件时显示发布说明\n`关闭`：静默模式。您仍然可以在 [GitHub](https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm) 上阅读发布说明

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示个人资料叶子节点

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Wait time for automatic note rating
ast.target: 自动笔记评分等待时间

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Time how long notices are shown

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的标签1, 标签2/子标签, …

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的文件夹1, 文件夹2, …

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 选择图片 / 粘贴 URL...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Starting with v2.0.0-beta.1 date-fns doesn't accept strings as date arguments. Please use `parseISO` to parse strings. See: https://github.com/date-fns/date-fns/blob/master/docs/upgradeGuide.md#string-arguments
ast.target: 从 v2.0.0-beta.1 开始，date-fns 不再接受字符串作为日期参数。请使用 `parseISO` 解析字符串。详见：https://github.com/date-fns/date-fns/blob/master/docs/upgradeGuide.md#string-arguments

ast.name: warn
ast.source: createItemContainer called with useBooster=false. This path should be unreachable if onOpen is correct.
ast.target: createItemContainer 以 useBooster=false 调用。如果 onOpen 正确，此路径应不可达。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tried to use the 'fill' option without the 'Filler' plugin enabled. Please import and register the 'Filler' plugin and make sure it is not disabled in the options
ast.target: 尝试在未启用 'Filler' 插件的情况下使用 'fill' 选项。请导入并注册 'Filler' 插件，并确保它未在选项中被禁用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You didn't find any ingredients this time, but better luck next time!
ast.target: 这次您没有找到任何材料，但祝您下次好运！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This time you didn't earn an ingredient.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Temporal Tweaker: reset the cooldown phase for a booster your choice
ast.target: 时间调整器：为你选择的增益效果重置冷却阶段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perpetual Progress: get 3 times points an all your actions for the next 4 hours. You can use Perpetual Progress every three days, if you have the ingredients to craft it.
ast.target: 永恒进展：在接下来的4小时内，你所有行动获得3倍积分。如果你有合成材料，每三天可以使用一次永恒进展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strategic Synapses: gain 3 times EP for all actions on Map Of Content ratings for the next 4 hours. This booster has a cooldown time of 5 days.
ast.target: 战略突触：在接下来的4小时内，你在内容地图评分的所有行动获得3倍经验。此增益效果有5天的冷却时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Accelerated Acquisition: Use Accelerated Acquisition and collect much faster for the next 12 hours all sorts of ingredients when creating and improving notes
ast.target: 加速获取：使用加速获取，在接下来的12小时内，创建和改进笔记时，更快地收集各种材料。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Linkers Lode: collect extra points when creating chain of thoughts for the next 3 hours. (cooldown 2 days)
ast.target: 链接矿脉：在接下来的3小时内，创建思维链时获得额外积分。（冷却时间2天）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Effortless Expansion: Cast "Effortless Expansion" and lower the cap to the next level about 20% in the next 5 days. (Cooldown 20 days)
ast.target: 轻松扩展：施放“轻松扩展”，在接下来的5天内，将升级上限降低约20%。（冷却时间20天）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recursive Reflection: Improve your notes and get 5 times the points you get on normal condition for the next 5 hours. Cooldown 3 days.
ast.target: 递归反思：改进你的笔记，在接下来的5小时内获得正常情况下5倍的积分。冷却时间3天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Synaptic Surge: Link your ideas together, every increase in "linking maturity" pays out 20 times for the next 2 hours.
ast.target: 突触激增：将你的想法链接在一起，在接下来的2小时内，每次“链接成熟度”提升都会获得20倍回报。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inspiration Infusion: Increase the frequency to get helpful prompts to power up you personal knowledge management for the next 2 days.
ast.target: 灵感注入：在接下来的2天内，增加获得有助于提升你个人知识管理的提示的频率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Title Titan: Quadro your points when making your note title more to the point expressing the idea of your note for the next 3 hours.
ast.target: 标题泰坦：在接下来的3小时内，当你使笔记标题更切中要点、表达笔记想法时，获得四倍积分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Precision Prism: 4 times the points when increasing the "note length majurity" for a note the next 3 hours.
ast.target: 精准棱镜：在接下来的3小时内，提升笔记的“笔记长度成熟度”时获得4倍积分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hyperlink Harmony: Get for "Inlink maturity" AND "outlink maturity" improvements 5 times the point the next 3 hours.
ast.target: 超链接和谐：在接下来的3小时内，提升“入链成熟度”和“出链成熟度”时获得5倍积分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Huzzah! You've embarked on the path of knowledge and earned the title of 'Enlightened Novice.' The journey has just begun, and you're already radiating wisdom like a baby sun!
ast.target: 太棒了！你已踏上知识之路，获得了“启蒙新手”的称号。旅程才刚刚开始，你已像初升的太阳般散发着智慧的光芒！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fantastic! You've embraced the wonders of learning and become a 'Curious Connoisseur.' Your appetite for knowledge is insatiable, like a bottomless bowl of ice cream!
ast.target: 太棒了！你已拥抱学习的奇妙，成为了一位“好奇鉴赏家”。你对知识的渴望永不满足，就像一碗永远吃不完的冰淇淋！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bravo! As a 'Brainiac Trailblazer,' you've carved your way through a jungle of information and emerged victorious. Your intellect is a beacon shining brightly for others to follow!
ast.target: 好极了！作为“智慧开拓者”，你已在信息的丛林中开辟道路并取得胜利。你的智慧是照亮他人前行道路的灯塔！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Impressive! You're now a 'Scholarly Trailblazer,' boldly venturing through a sea of knowledge with a compass of curiosity and a map of intellect!
ast.target: 令人印象深刻！你现在是一位“博学开拓者”，以好奇心为罗盘，以智慧为地图，勇敢地航行在知识的海洋中！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Incredible! You've reached the pinnacle of stealthy knowledge management. As an 'Info Ninja Master,' you can snatch information from the shadows like a digital ninja!
ast.target: 难以置信！你已达到隐秘知识管理的顶峰。作为“信息忍者大师”，你能像数字忍者一样从阴影中攫取信息！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whoo-hoo! You've achieved 'Wise Owl Guru' status. Your wisdom is legendary, and your hoots of knowledge echo through the forest of ignorance!
ast.target: 呜呼！你已达到“智慧猫头鹰大师”的境界。你的智慧是传奇性的，你对知识的呼唤回荡在无知的森林中！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Eureka! You've become an 'Einstein Incarnate,' pushing the boundaries of understanding and bending the fabric of knowledge to your will!
ast.target: 尤里卡！你已成为“爱因斯坦化身”，推动理解的边界，将知识的结构弯曲为你所用！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Magnificent! You've ascended to the rank of 'Mastermind Sage,' guiding the rivers of information and enlightening all who seek wisdom!
ast.target: 太宏伟了！你已晋升为“策士贤者”，引导信息的河流，启迪所有寻求智慧的人！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bravissimo! You're now a 'Cerebral Maestro,' conducting the symphony of knowledge with the finesse of a virtuoso conductor!
ast.target: 太精彩了！你现在是一位“大脑大师”，以精湛的技艺指挥着知识的交响乐！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Serenity achieved! As a 'Zen Knowledge Keeper,' you maintain a tranquil mind while managing vast pools of knowledge with grace and poise.
ast.target: 宁静达成！作为“禅意知识守护者”，你以优雅和沉着管理着庞大的知识库，同时保持内心的宁静。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All hail the 'Grand Archivist Overlord!' You wield the knowledge of ages and hold the keys to unlock the gates of wisdom!
ast.target: 向“档案大君主”致敬！你掌握着历代的知识，手握开启智慧之门的钥匙！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Congratulations, oh wise one! You've attained the highest level of enlightenment as the 'Omniscient Sage of Everything.' Your understanding knows no bounds, and your wisdom is as vast as the cosmos itself!
ast.target: 恭喜，智者！你已达到“万物通晓贤者”的最高启蒙境界。你的理解无边无际，你的智慧如宇宙般浩瀚！

ast.name: description
ast.source: You've hit the ground running with your existing knowledge treasures! You're already an 'Lore Apprentice,' armed with a wealth of wisdom and ready to shape it further.
ast.target: 你已凭借现有的知识宝藏迅速起步！你已是一位“传说学徒”，装备着丰富的智慧，并准备进一步塑造它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your existing notes have given you a head start! You're now a 'Savvy Scholar,' confidently diving into the sea of information with a treasure trove of insights.
ast.target: 你现有的笔记让你抢占了先机！你现在是一位“精明学者”，自信地潜入信息的海洋，带着一箱洞察力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Building upon your pre-existing notes, you're establishing the 'Sage's Foundation' for an even grander edifice of knowledge. Your groundwork is impressive!
ast.target: 在你现有笔记的基础上，你正在为更宏伟的知识大厦奠定“贤者之基”。你的基础工作令人印象深刻！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your existing notes have nurtured the growth of a 'Wisdom Seedling.' You're cultivating your garden of knowledge with care and patience.
ast.target: 你现有的笔记培育了一颗“智慧幼苗”的成长。你正以细心和耐心耕耘着你的知识花园。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Thanks to your prior efforts, you're a 'Prodigious Preparer,' standing tall among your notes and ready to conquer new realms of understanding.
ast.target: 得益于你先前的努力，你是一位“非凡准备者”，在你的笔记中屹立不倒，准备征服理解的新领域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your past notes have led you to the grand 'Epic Epiphany Explorer' status! You've already been down a few rabbit holes and come out with dazzling discoveries.
ast.target: 你过去的笔记已引领你达到宏伟的“史诗顿悟探索者”境界！你已探索过几个兔子洞，并带着耀眼的发现走出来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With your existing notes illuminating your path, you've become a 'Lore Luminary,' shining light on the mysteries of the universe, one idea at a time.
ast.target: 在你现有笔记照亮道路的情况下，你已成为一位“传说灯塔”，一次一个想法地照亮宇宙的奥秘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your mastery of personal knowledge management has elevated you to the esteemed rank of the 'Scribe of the Ancients.' Your existing notes have transformed into treasures, bridging the gap between old wisdom and new discoveries.
ast.target: 你对个人知识管理的精通已将你提升至备受尊敬的“古代抄写员”等级。你现有的笔记已转化为珍宝，架起了古老智慧与新发现之间的桥梁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Armed with your existing notes, you're the 'Eureka Maestro,' composing a symphony of insights that harmonize with the melody of discovery.
ast.target: 装备着你现有的笔记，你是“尤里卡大师”，谱写着一曲与发现旋律和谐共鸣的洞察力交响乐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With your existing notes standing as a testament, you've ascended to the illustrious 'Chronicles Champion' level. Your journey through time's tapestry has brought forth a symphony of insights that harmonize past and present.
ast.target: 在你现有笔记的见证下，你已晋升至辉煌的“编年史冠军”等级。你穿越时间织锦的旅程带来了一曲融合过去与现在的洞察力交响乐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As 'The Curious Cartographer,' your existing notes have mapped out uncharted territories of understanding. Your curiosity knows no bounds, and your notes are the compass guiding your exploration.
ast.target: 作为“好奇制图师”，你现有的笔记已绘制出理解的未知领域。你的好奇心永无止境，你的笔记是引导你探索的罗盘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your existing notes have made you the 'Sultan of Synthesis.' You're the master weaver, threading together threads of information into a rich tapestry of insight.
ast.target: 你现有的笔记使你成为“综合苏丹”。你是大师级的编织者，将信息的线索编织成一幅丰富的洞察力织锦。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the pinnacle of personal knowledge mastery, you're now revered as the 'Eternal Archivist.' Your existing notes, carefully curated and nurtured, stand as immortal beacons, guiding seekers through the labyrinth of knowledge across ages.
ast.target: 在个人知识掌握的顶峰，你现在被尊为“永恒档案管理员”。你精心策划和培育的现有笔记，作为不朽的灯塔，引导寻求者穿越跨越时代的知识迷宫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Congratulations! You've woven a tapestry of knowledge for 30 consecutive days. As a 'Consistent Lore Weaver,' your daily contributions have become the threads that enrich the fabric of your growing wisdom.
ast.target: 恭喜！你已连续30天编织了一幅知识织锦。作为“持之以恒的传说编织者”，你每日的贡献已成为丰富你日益增长的智慧织锦的丝线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You've forged a robust foundation with 90 consecutive days of dedicated note crafting. As a 'Knowledge Artisan Stalwart,' your commitment has sculpted your repository into a work of art, a testament to your persistent curiosity.
ast.target: 你通过连续90天专注的笔记制作，锻造了一个坚实的基础。作为“知识工匠中坚”，你的承诺已将你的知识库塑造成一件艺术品，证明了你持久的好奇心。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With each passing day, you've laid down the blueprints of a profound structure. As a 'Wisdom Architect Virtuoso' at 180 days, your continuous efforts have transformed your knowledge space into an architectural marvel, a testament to your enduring passion for learning.
ast.target: 随着每一天的过去，你已为一座深刻的建筑奠定了蓝图。作为180天的“智慧建筑大师”，你持续的努力已将你的知识空间转变为建筑奇迹，证明了你对学习持久的热情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A year of unwavering dedication! You've earned the title of 'Eternal Scholar Maestro' by contributing daily for 365 days. Your commitment has created a masterpiece of continuous learning, setting you apart as a true maestro of personal knowledge.
ast.target: 一年坚定不移的奉献！通过连续365天的贡献，你赢得了“永恒学者大师”的称号。你的承诺创造了一部持续学习的杰作，使你成为真正的个人知识大师。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Behold the divine! Your unbroken streak of daily contributions for 730 days crowns you as the 'Divine Omniscience Overlord.' Your two-year feat is a testament to your unmatched commitment and the creation of a knowledge empire that stands as a beacon for all seekers.
ast.target: 见证神圣！你连续730天不间断的每日贡献，使你荣登“神圣全知君主”之位。你两年的壮举证明了你无与伦比的承诺，以及建立了一个作为所有寻求者灯塔的知识帝国。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Precision Prism: 4 times the points when increasing the "note length maturity" for a note the next 3 hours.
ast.target: 精准棱镜：在接下来的3小时内，提升笔记的“笔记长度成熟度”时获得4倍积分。

ast.name: label
ast.source: Points to Earn to Level Up

ast.name: text
ast.source: Like the plugin? High five me on Ko-fi! No account needed!
ast.target: 喜欢这个插件吗？在 Ko-fi 上给我击掌！无需账户！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose your path to power up!
ast.target: 选择你的力量提升之路！
